prompt: A medium close-up of a single young woman inside a dimly lit Japanese-style bar, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. The frame catches a suspended quiet between conversations — the kind of stillness that only exists late at night in a half-empty bar. East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20). Skin subsurface scattering visible under warm directional bar light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge, fine foundation powder grain perceptible near the jaw. She wears a dark ribbed slip dress, relaxed but deliberate — the kind of outfit chosen without overthinking. One hand loosely wrapped around a lowball glass with amber liquid, elbow resting lightly on the wooden bar counter. Two or three stray hairs displaced by faint air movement, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical. Mixed artificial light sources — a warm amber pendant lamp overhead creates a soft gold pool across her shoulder. A faint neon bar sign casts a thin pink-magenta rim light along her cheekbone and collarbone. Rows of spirit bottles glow amber on backlit shelving behind. The mood is self-possessed and cool, a quiet confidence in the stillness. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

promptZh: 一张单人年轻女性的中景特写，场景位于 光线昏暗的日式酒吧，真实的日常生活摄影，自然的纪实瞬间。画面捕捉到了对话间隙的宁静——那种只存在于深夜半空酒吧里的静谧感。东亚年轻女性，年龄约 20 出头。杏仁眼，自然双眼皮，眼角略微上扬。鼻梁挺直精致。肤色为白皙至浅米色（NC10–NC20）。在温暖的酒吧定向光线下，皮肤呈现出可见的次表面散射效果，颧骨和鼻梁上有微小的镜面高光，下颌附近可见细腻的粉底颗粒感。她穿着一件 深色罗纹吊带裙，随性而不失考究——那种不经意间挑选的穿搭。一只手随意地握着装有琥珀色液体的矮平底玻璃杯，手肘轻轻靠在木质吧台上。两三缕发丝因微弱的气流而散落，呈现出自然的非刻意瑕疵，非几何对称。混合人工光源——头顶一盏温暖的琥珀色吊灯在她的肩头投下一片柔和的金光。微弱的霓虹灯招牌在她的颧骨和锁骨边缘投下淡淡的粉紫色轮廓光。背景架子上，一排排酒瓶在背光下发出琥珀色的光芒。整体氛围从容冷峻，在静谧中透着一种安静的自信。阴影区域带有细微的 ISO 400 胶片颗粒感，呈现出摄影噪点纹理，而非 CG 渲染的平滑感。宽高比 2:3。无水印，无文字叠加，非卡通，非数字绘画，非插画，非动漫。
